---
title: "FIRST_5_STEPS"
author: '520004915'
date: "2024-04-11"
output: html_document
---
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(GEOquery)
library(limma)
library(caret)
library(stringr)
rm(list=ls())

gse1 ='GSE36059'
gse2 ='GSE129166'

eSet1 <- getGEO('GSE36059')
eSet1<- eSet1$GSE36059_series_matrix.txt.gz
eSet2 <- getGEO('GSE129166')
eSet2<- eSet2$GSE129166_series_matrix.txt.gz

exp1 <- exprs(eSet1)
phe1 <- pData(phenoData(eSet1))
feature1<-fData(eSet1)

exp2 <- exprs(eSet2)
phe2 <- pData(phenoData(eSet2))
feature2<-fData(eSet2)
#clean features
f1 <-feature1 %>% filter(`Gene Symbol` != '', !is.na(`Gene Symbol`))
f1$'Gene Symbol' <- sapply(strsplit(f1$'Gene Symbol', ' /// '), function(x) x[1])

f2 <-feature2 %>% filter(`Gene Symbol` != '', !is.na(`Gene Symbol`))
f2$'Gene Symbol' <- sapply(strsplit(f2$'Gene Symbol', ' /// '), function(x) x[1])

#conbime gene expressions
table(rownames(exp1) %in% rownames(exp2))
exp1 <- exp1[intersect(rownames(exp1),rownames(exp2)),]
exp2 <- exp2[intersect(rownames(exp1),rownames(exp2)),]

if(!identical(rownames(phe1),colnames(exp1))) exp1 = exp1[,match(rownames(phe1),colnames(exp1))]
if(!identical(rownames(phe2),colnames(exp2))) exp2 = exp2[,match(rownames(phe2),colnames(exp2))]

exp <- cbind(exp1,exp2)

#remove batch effects
batch_info <- c(rep(1, ncol(exp1)), rep(2, ncol(exp2)))
exprSet_corrected <- removeBatchEffect(exp, batch_info)
##set groups
phe1$outcome <- ifelse(str_detect(phe1$title, 'non-rejecting'), 'non-rejection',
                       ifelse(str_detect(phe1$title, 'ABMR'), 'ABMR',
                              ifelse(str_detect(phe1$title, 'TCMR'), 'TCMR', 'Other')))
phe1 <- phe1%>% filter(outcome != 'Other')#remove other

phe2 <-phe2 %>% mutate(
  ABMR_Status = ifelse(`abmr (no:ch1` == '0_Yes:1): 1', 'ABMR', 'ABMR Stable'),
  TCMR_Status = ifelse(`tcmr (no:ch1` == '0_borderline:1_TCMR:2): 1', 'TCMR', 'TCMR Stable')
  )%>%
    filter(!(ABMR_Status == 'ABMR' & TCMR_Status == 'TCMR')) %>%
  mutate(
    outcome = case_when(
      ABMR_Status == 'ABMR Stable' & TCMR_Status == 'TCMR Stable' ~ 'non-rejection',
      ABMR_Status == 'ABMR Stable' ~ 'TCMR',
      TCMR_Status == 'TCMR Stable' ~ 'ABMR',
      TRUE ~ NA_character_
    )
  )
###remove both TCMR and ABMR, then if the original sting was TCMR Stable, then it appears to be ABMR

group <- table(c(phe1$outcome, phe2$outcome))

#normalisation
combine_ID <- union(feature1$ID, feature2$ID)
eMat <- exprSet_corrected[rownames(exprSet_corrected) %in% combine_ID, ]
gene_means <- rowMeans(eMat)
gene_percentile <- rank(gene_means) / length(gene_means)
threshold <- 0.25
filtered_genes <- eMat[gene_percentile > threshold,]
## [normalisation]
exprSet <- normalizeBetweenArrays(filtered_genes)
qx <- as.numeric(quantile(exprSet,c(0.,0.25,0.5,0.75,0.99,1.0),na.rm=T))
logC <- (qx[5]>100) ||
           (qx[6]-qx[1]>50 && qx[2]>0) ||
            (qx[2]>0 && qx[2]<1 && qx[4]>1 && qx[4]<2)
if (logC){
  exprSet [which(exprSet <=0)] <- NaN
  exprSet_clean <- log2(exprSet)
  print('log2 transformation finished')
}else{
  print('does not need log2 transformation')
}
#normalisaton done, see how it looks
boxplot(exp)#after combination
boxplot(exprSet_corrected)#bacth effected
boxplot(exprSet)#normaled


```
